title: Elemental Maces Paper
description: This plugin for paper 1.21/1.21.1 adds 6 different custom maces.
body:
# **MACES**

There are 6 maces:

_**1:**_ _Water Mace: **When holding this mace and touching water you get the water breathing and dolphins grace effect. This mace is mainly for transportation/travelling.**_

_**2:**_ _Earth Mace:_ **When using this mace you apply slowness to your target while you get speed. Amazing for PVP.**

_**3:**_ _Fire Mace_ **When using the fire mace, you will apply a ring of fire around you, trapping your target to either go through the fire or fight you. Perfect for close range combat.**

4: **_Wind Mace_** **When right clicking while holding the mace, you will teleport 15 blocks up, you get safety from fall damage temporarily, perfect for when you run out of wind charges.**

5: **_Warden Mace_** **When you smash with this mace, you apply blindness and poison to everyone in a 10 block radius for 5 seconds. It also makes the Wither Heartbeat sound every ~20 seconds due to it being fueled by the wardens rage.**

6: _**Shulker Mace**_ **Do you ever run out of shulker shells? Well worry no more, with this mace there is a 7% chance you get 1 shulker shell in your inventory when smashing.**

## **Original idea:**
This plugin was originally used in Universal SMP (Ran by @Jitscraft),

It is now getting re-implemented in Limitless SMP (Ran by @Nebuall).
